source_files.main.spy:
from implementations import Circle, Rectangle, DoubleValue

def main():
    c = Circle("round", 2.5)
    r = Rectangle("box", 3.0, 4.0)
    d = DoubleValue(10.0)
    
    print(c.draw())
    print(c.area())
    print(r.draw())
    print(r.area())
    print(d.compute())
